title: How 'electric' Watkins forced his way back into Tuchel's England
summary: Aston Villa's Ollie Watkins has impressed with an outstanding hot streak since being excluded from England's squad in March, earning praise from Match of the Day pundits. His performances demonstrate his quality and determination to force his way back into Thomas Tuchel's plans.
content: Match of the Day pundits Alan Shearer and Wayne Rooney praise Aston Villa's Ollie Watkins on his "unbelievable" hot streak since he was left out of the England squad in March.

zh.title: "炽热"沃特金斯如何重回图赫尔的英格兰队
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉的奥利·沃特金斯自3月被英格兰队除名后,以出色的连胜表现给人留下深刻印象,赢得了足球评论员的赞扬。他的表现证明了他的实力和决心,要重新进入托马斯·图赫尔的计划。

title: Torreense stun Sporting to win Portuguese Cup
summary: Second-division side Torreense pulled off a major upset by defeating defending champions Sporting in the Portuguese Cup final, winning 2-1 with a penalty in extra time. The victory represents a stunning achievement for the lower-division club.
content: Second division side Torreense stun holders Sporting to win the Portuguese Cup with a penalty in extra time sealing a 2-1 victory.

zh.title: 托雷埃塞爆冷赢得葡萄牙杯击败体育队

title: Man Utd target West Ham's Fernandes - Monday's gossip
summary: Manchester United are pursuing West Ham's Mateus Fernandes and Atalanta's Ederson, while other clubs pursue their own transfer targets including Tottenham chasing Paulo Dybala and Nottingham Forest seeking Middlesbrough's Hayden Hackney. The transfer market is heating up with multiple clubs actively pursuing priority targets.
content: Manchester United target West Ham's Mateus Fernandes and Atalanta's Ederson, Tottenham chase Paulo Dybala and Nottingham Forest seek Middlesbrough's Hayden Hackney, plus more.

zh.title: 曼联目标西汉姆费尔南德斯——周一转会消息

title: Como qualify for Champions League for first time while AC Milan & Juventus miss out
summary: Cesc Fabregas's Como achieved historic Champions League qualification for the first time in club history with a 4-1 victory over 10-man Cremonese on the final day of Serie A. The achievement marks a remarkable turnaround after years in lower divisions.
content: Cesc Fabregas's Como qualify for the Champions League for the first time in their history with a 4-1 victory over 10-man Cremonese on the final day of the Serie A season.

zh.title: 科莫首次获欧冠资格，AC米兰和尤文图斯无缘

title: Who has qualified for next season's Champions League?
summary: BBC Sport analyzes which teams have already qualified for the 2026-27 Champions League following the conclusion of this season's European races. The coverage identifies the clubs securing places in next season's competition.

title: I arrived as a stranger and I will leave as a South Londoner - Glasner
summary: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner reflects on his tenure with the club after his final home match, a 2-1 defeat to Premier League champions Arsenal. Glasner praised the club's passionate South London fanbase.
content: Oliver Glasner praises Crystal Palace's "amazing" fans after his final home game as The Eagles' manager, a 2-1 defeat to Premier League champions Arsenal.

zh.title: 我以陌生人身份来到，以南伦敦人身份离开 - 格拉斯纳

title: Conte to leave Napoli a year after winning Serie A
summary: Antonio Conte announces his departure from Napoli just 12 months after leading the club to Serie A glory. The decision concludes his successful stint in Italian football.

title: Could title win start period of dominance for Arsenal?
summary: Arsenal have captured the Premier League title after a 22-year absence, raising questions about whether this victory marks the start of sustained dominance for the north London club.

content: Marco Silva remains elusive on his future as Fulham manager following their win against Newcastle, saying that the wait for the announcement "cannot be longer than next week".

content:
Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola's says that he feels "so much love" for the club
in his final post-match interview following their 2-1 defeat at home to Aston Villa.

title: Watkins & Villa spoil Guardiola's final Man City match

zh.title: 沃特金斯和阿斯顿维拉破坏瓜迪奥拉的曼城最后一场比赛

title: What happens now at relegated West Ham?
summary: West Ham's 14-year tenure in the Premier League has concluded with their relegation, raising questions about the club's future direction. The article examines the changes and challenges ahead as they prepare for Championship football.

zh.title: West Ham降级后会发生什么?

title: 'Spurs avoid humiliation but elation of fans will soon turn to anger'
summary: Chief football writer Phil McNulty argues that while Tottenham's survival prevents complete humiliation, their narrow escape cannot mask a disastrous season that nearly ended in relegation. McNulty suggests fan celebrations will be short-lived as the reality of their underperformance sets in.
content: Tottenham Hotspur's celebrations in survival cannot cover up their embarrassment of a season that almost ended in the unthinkable, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

zh.title: 热刺躲过耻辱,但球迷的欢欣鼓舞将很快转为愤怒

title: Burnley and Wolves end Premier League campaigns with draw
summary: Burnley and Wolves played out a 1-1 draw at Turf Moor to conclude their Premier League seasons, both having already been mathematically relegated weeks earlier. The match represented a disappointing end to difficult campaigns for both sides.
content: Burnley and Wolves play out a 1-1 draw at Turf Moor to close out a miserable Premier League campaign for the two sides, who were relegated well in advance of the final day.

zh.title: 伯恩利和狼队以平局结束英超赛季

title: Pep: City can't 'copy and paste' for my successor
summary: Pep Guardiola stated that Manchester City cannot simply replicate his success with a new manager and declined to recommend his successor. His comments underscore the unique challenge of replacing one of football's most successful tactical minds.
content: Pep Guardiola has said he won't advise Manchester City on which manager should replace him.

zh.title: 瓜迪奥拉：曼城无法"复制粘贴"我的继任者
zh.summary: 瓜迪奥拉表示，曼城无法简单地用新主教练复制他的成功，并拒绝推荐他的继任者。他的评论凸显了取代足球历史上最成功的战术大脑之一的独特挑战。

title: Flubbed lines, impressionists and Tom Jones - Football Focus memories
summary: As Football Focus airs its final episode, hosts and pundits reflect on memorable moments from the show's history, including comedic segments and celebrity appearances. The long-running BBC program concludes with nostalgic reflections on its decades-long legacy.
content: On the final episode of Football Focus, the hosts and pundits reminisce on their fondest memories from their time on the show.

zh.title: 台词失误、模仿秀和汤姆·琼斯——足球焦点的回忆
zh.summary: 随着《足球焦点》播出最后一集，主持人和评论员回顾了该节目历史上的难忘时刻，包括喜剧片段和名人出场。这个长期运营的BBC节目以对其数十年遗产的怀旧反思而告终。

title: Notts County v Salford - a battle of the ages at Wembley
summary: The League Two play-off final between Notts County and Salford City represents a significant clash at Wembley between two historic clubs with different trajectories. The match holds symbolic weight as both sides seek promotion to a higher division.
content: BBC Sports looks at why Notts County's League Two play-off final with Salford City will be a clash of the age at Wembley.

zh.title: 诺茨郡对萨福德城——温布利的经典之战
zh.summary: 英冠第二级联赛季后赛决赛在温布利球场上演，诺茨郡和萨福德城两支历史悠久的俱乐部各自代表不同的发展轨迹。这场比赛意义重大，双方都在争取升入更高级别的联赛。

title: Iran says World Cup base moved to Mexico from US
summary: Iran announced that FIFA approved moving its World Cup training base from the United States to Mexico, citing geopolitical concerns. The relocation highlights ongoing diplomatic tensions affecting World Cup preparations.
content: Iran says Fifa has approved the country's World Cup training base being switched from the United States to Mexico.

zh.title: 伊朗表示世界杯基地从美国迁往墨西哥
zh.summary: 伊朗宣布国际足联批准将其世界杯训练基地从美国迁往墨西哥，理由是地缘政治考虑。这一迁移反映了影响世界杯筹备工作的持续外交紧张局势。

title: Rangers want to sign Hearts' Shankland - gossip
summary: Rangers are reportedly targeting Hearts captain Shankland as they prepare for next season. The potential transfer adds intrigue to the Scottish football landscape as Celtic's manager prepares important strategic meetings.
content: Hearts captain linked with Rangers as Celtic manager expects meeting with major shareholder.

zh.title: 流言：流浪者队欲签下心脏队的尚克兰德
zh.summary: 据报道，流浪者队正在为下赛季做准备，目标是签下心脏队队长尚克兰德。这一潜在转会为苏格兰足球增添悬念，恰逢凯尔特人队主帅正筹划重要战略会议。

title: How well do you remember this season's Premier League?
summary: BBC Football offers a quiz challenging fans to test their knowledge of the 2025-26 Premier League season before the campaign concludes with its final matches. The interactive feature allows supporters to gauge their recall of key moments throughout the season.
content: Test your knowledge of the 2025-26 Premier League season before the final round of fixtures.

zh.title: 你对本赛季英超的记忆有多深？

title: FPL talking point - players to make a final-week impact
summary: With only one Premier League round remaining, Fantasy Premier League managers can gain competitive advantage by selecting underowned players for their final team selections. Low-ownership picks could prove decisive in mini-league battles.
content: With only one round of Premier League fixtures remaining, selecting players with low ownership could be crucial to jumping above a rival in your mini-league - so here are three options.

zh.summary: 仅剩英超最后一轮，梦幻英超经理可以通过在最终阵容中选择持有人数较少的球员来获得竞争优势。持有率较低的选择可能在小型联赛的竞争中起决定性作用。

title: What does WSL relegation mean for Leicester City?
summary: After a five-year stay in the Women's Super League, Leicester City were relegated on Saturday. The milestone raises questions about the club's competitive future and path forward.

zh.summary: 在女超联赛效力五年后，莱斯特城在周六被降级。这一重要事件引发了关于该俱乐部竞争力未来和前进道路的问题。

title: An architect who redefined football - why Guardiola stands apart
summary: Pep Guardiola is recognized among football's greatest managers, with his tactical innovations and consistent success setting him apart from peers. His ability to redefine football strategy across different clubs cements his legacy.
content: Pep Guardiola undoubtedly belongs among football's greatest managers, but Spanish football expert Guillem Balague explores why he stands apart.

zh.title: 重新定义足球的建筑师——瓜迪奥拉为何与众不同

title: Why the stakes are so high for Spurs and West Ham
summary: Tottenham and West Ham face a crucial relegation shootout with extremely high stakes for both clubs' Premier League status. The outcome will significantly impact both teams' immediate future in the top flight.

title: 9 stats that explain how Arsenal became one of the...
summary: Arsenal's Premier League success was built on establishing themselves as the best defensive team in club history, supported by nine key statistics. Defensive excellence formed the foundation of their title-winning campaign.
content: All Arsenal had to do to win the Premier League was become the best defensive team we've ever seen. Here's how they did it.

title: Robertson leaves Liverpool as 'The People's Champi...
summary: Andy Robertson is leaving Liverpool after nine years, departing as a legendary figure whose impact profoundly shaped the club and the city. The Scotland international's departure marks the end of a transformative era on Merseyside.
content: The impact that the Scotland defender has had on Merseyside sees him depart as a legend after nine years.

zh.title: 罗伯逊离开利物浦，成为'人民冠军'
zh.summary: 安迪·罗伯逊在效力利物浦九年后离队，作为一位传奇人物离开，他的影响深刻塑造了俱乐部和城市。这位苏格兰国脚的离队标志着默西塞德一个变革时代的结束。

title: Jubilant Hull City promoted to the Premier League
summary: Hull City secured Premier League promotion by defeating Middlesbrough 1-0 in the Championship playoff final at Wembley Stadium on Saturday.
content: Hull City have been promoted to the Premier League after a 1-0 win in the Championship playoff final against Middlesbrough on Saturday at Wembley Stadium.

zh.title: 赫尔城晋升英超
zh.summary: 赫尔城在周六温布利大球场英冠附加赛决赛中以1-0击败米德尔斯堡，确保了英超晋升资格。

title: Kane hat trick powers Bayern to German Cup title
summary: Harry Kane scored a hat trick as Bayern Munich won the German Cup final 3-0 over Stuttgart, claiming their 21st title and first since 2020. Kane's season tally reached 61 goals.
content: Harry Kane had a hat trick, improving his season tally to 61 goals, as Bayern Munich beat Stuttgart 3-0 in the German Cup final to lift the trophy for the 21st time and first since 2020.

zh.title: 凯恩帽子戏法助拜仁赢得德国杯
zh.summary: 哈里·凯恩梅开三度，拜仁慕尼黑在德国杯决赛中以3-0击败斯图加特，赢得了他们的第21个冠军，也是自2020年以来的首个。凯恩本赛季进球数达到61球。

title: Lewandowski scores in farewell as Barcelona lose
summary: Valencia defeated LaLiga champions Barcelona 3-1 in a come-from-behind victory on the final day of the season, with Robert Lewandowski scoring in what appeared to be his farewell.
content: Valencia scored twice in the space of five second-half minutes as they came from behind to beat LaLiga champions Barcelona 3-1, although it was not enough to earn them European qualification on the final day of the season.

zh.title: 莱万多夫斯基告别进球，巴塞罗那落败
zh.summary: 巴伦西亚在赛季最后一天以3-1逆转击败西甲冠军巴塞罗那，罗伯特·莱万多夫斯基进球，这似乎是他的告别之作。

title: Putellas on Barcelona future: 'You will see'
summary: Barcelona won the Women's Champions League for the fourth time with a 4-0 victory over OL Lyonnes, though midfielder Alexia Putellas remained noncommittal about her future with the club.
content: OSLO, Norway -- Alexia Putellas sidestepped questions about her future after helping Barcelona win the Women's Champions League on Saturday with a resounding 4-0 victory against OL Lyonnes at the Ullevaal Stadion.

zh.title: 普特埃拉斯谈巴塞罗那的未来："你会看到的"
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那以4:0的比分战胜里昂女足，第四次赢得女足欧冠冠军，但中场球员阿莱克西亚·普特埃拉斯对自己在俱乐部的未来保持了模棱两可的态度。

title: Sources: Reyna in as U.S. picks World Cup roster
summary: USMNT coach Mauricio Pochettino announced his 26-man World Cup roster, with midfielder Gio Reyna among those selected for the tournament.
content: USMNT coach Mauricio Pochettino has selected his 26-man roster for the upcoming World Cup, with Gio Reyna among those included, sources confirmed to ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：美国队选定世界杯阵容，雷纳入选
zh.summary: 美国队主帅毛里西奥·波切蒂诺公布了26人世界杯大名单，中场球员吉奥·雷纳入选参加比赛。

title: Iran says WC camp moved to from U.S to Mexico
summary: Iran's soccer federation moved the national team's World Cup training base from the United States to Mexico following FIFA approval.
content: The president of the governing body of Iranian soccer said Saturday that the nation's World Cup training base has been moved to Mexico from the United States after getting approval from FIFA.

zh.title: 伊朗称世界杯营地从美国迁往墨西哥
zh.summary: 伊朗足球协会在获得国际足联批准后，将国家队的世界杯训练基地从美国迁至墨西哥。

title: Carvajal mourns 'end of an era' in Madrid farewell...
summary: Real Madrid defender Dani Carvajal departed the club after playing his final match in a 4-2 victory over Athletic Club, describing it as the "end of a marvellous era."
content: Dani Carvajal said his departure marks the "end of a marvellous era" at Real Madrid after the defender played his last game for the club in a 4-2 win over Athletic Club.

zh.title: 卡瓦哈尔在马德里告别中为'时代终结'而哀悼
zh.summary: 皇马后卫丹尼·卡瓦哈尔在4-2战胜竞技队的最后一场比赛后离开俱乐部，称这是"一个美好时代的终结"。
